subcodes.first_line: O son-in-law of Dhabíḥ, thou who expressest in the sweet tongue!* Languages are many and words are various, but the purpose of them all is to depict meanings
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای صهر ذبیح و ترجمان در لسان ملیح السن مختلف و لغات متفاوت لکن مراد از جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @limits of language, @the power of words; of speech
